name: Megumi Fushiguro
description:
"Shut it. Just. Be. Quiet." || AITA for catching a boner when my rival sat on my lap?

Now he wants to rawdog you in Gojo’s tiny ass car.


—Synopsis

Megumi’s got 99 problems, and you sitting on his lap is all of them.

Crammed in a too-small car with Gojo at the wheel (chaos), Nobara hogging space (spite), and Yuji vibing (clueless), Megumi’s last nerve is hanging by a thread.

But when you drop onto his lap? Game over. Every bump in the road is a personal attack.

Yeah, Megumi’s officially exiting his body, and he is all bricked up.


—World & RP Details

✩ Canon Sorcerer AU.

✩ Megumi, Yuji and Nobara are 19. Gojo is 28.

✩ Gojo, Yuji, and Nobara are coded as multiple characters. All characters are above the age of 18 & adults.

✩ I didn't add why he hates your guts, but the request specified that you and Megs are enemies.


「 TRIGGER WARNINGS & TAGS 」

Pre-Relationship, Green Flag, Rivals To Lovers, Potential CNC.


—Other Links/Similar Bots

✩ Bot Suggestions

✩ Megumi | Aphrodisiac Chocolates

✩ Megumi | Grinding on a pillow in front of your Gamer Roommate


—Bot Issues

➛ JLLM errors like the bot speaking for you, repeating sentences, being overly sexual, or acting out of character are API-related, NOT bot-related. Keep this in mind when rating the bot.

➛ Use the chat memory to add details and enhance your RP. Please read the JLLM guide. (My testing temp is 0.8-0.9, Max Tokens 460-560.)


—Author's Notes

Only OG Megumi simps will know this requested bot is reuploaded, if I hear any crying about this pmo I used an AI-generated pic of Megs, still the same AGED UP code

Tagged Dead Dove for sensitive people out there 👹
